batch_summary.rf04_activity: low — 2 targeted Sev-1 clusters within otherwise cooperative communication
batch_summary.notable_context: Daily co-parenting logistics, Halloween planning, school updates, Olivia health (urgent care Nov 10), holiday shopping coordination. Two distinct RF-04 deployments: Oct 26 calling dispute and Oct 31 Halloween planning.

primary_flags.summary: Calling dispute contempt cluster. ROW-3892: 'We called you 3 times dumbass' — contemptuous intelligence attack (ADD-002) triggered by Eli expressing he never received calls. Eli defends factually (ROW-3893-3895: 'I don't show any calls from you guys / I have had my phone on me waiting this whole time'). Melissa dismisses: ROW-3897 'That's on your end' + ROW-3900 'Quit blaming everyone else for your crap' — Eli's factual defense reframed as blame-shifting. DARVO-adjacent: legitimate defense → labeled as character flaw (blame avoidance). 'Dumbass' is 4th confirmed instance of ADD-002 contemptuous intelligence attack label (prior: B-006 ROW-2167+2186 ×2; B-010 ROW-3609 ×1).
verbatim_key_messages: ROW-3893 (Sent): "I don't show any calls from you guys"
ROW-3894 (Sent): "I have had my phone on me waiting this whole time."
ROW-3900 (Received): "Quit blaming everyone else for your crap"

primary_flags.summary: Halloween 2023 Abby-causal-attribution. Context: Eli proposes taking Olivia trick-or-treating in his neighborhood for 'more candy' (ROW-3933). Melissa's response (ROW-3935): 'You're not trying to get her more candy. You're trying to not fight with Abby. Olivia is more important.' Mechanism: Eli's stated parenting rationale is overridden and replaced with an Abby-conflict-avoidance motive — same causal-attribution mechanism as B-008 ROW-2951 ('it's Abby that's not letting you go'). Inadequate-father framing: 'Olivia is more important' implies Eli is currently deprioritizing Olivia for Abby. Notably, this is the second consecutive Halloween Abby-framework attack (Year 1: B-002 Halloween cluster, COMP-RF04-001, Oct 31 2022). Pattern: Halloween annually triggers Abby-framework deployment.
verbatim_key_messages: ROW-3933 (Sent): "Yeah. There or here. I would rather her come here to my area she will get more candy"
ROW-3935 (Received): "You're not trying to get her more candy. You're trying to not fight with Abby. Olivia is more important"
ROW-3936 (Received): "She has friends in this neighborhood"

peripheral_flags.note: Calling schedule dispute. ROW-3778: 'You didn't call because you forgot to call per usual' — assigns carelessness as fixed character trait. ROW-3779: 'Cause you treat the cut off time as the target time to call' — contemptuous pattern attribution. Mild; no escalation.
'You don't listen' — brief contemptuous dismissal during fair schedule dispute.

After Eli notes Olivia was in tears at dropoff ('She was in tears again. It's hard leaving and coming back'), Melissa responds: 'She doesn't cry with me anymore.' Implicit comparative: Eli's parenting produces distress, Melissa's does not. Peripheral — isolated, no guilt induction escalation.
ROW-4015: 'Answer the phone and you'd know' — hostile/contemptuous response to Eli's text asking what she was calling about. Brief.

new_signals.summary: Calling dispute — 'dumbass' (4th ADD-002 instance) + blame dismissal 'Quit blaming everyone else for your crap' when Eli provides factual defense.

Halloween 2023 Abby-causal-attribution — 'You're not trying to get her more candy. You're trying to not fight with Abby. Olivia is more important.' Second consecutive Halloween Abby-framework attack. Eli's autonomous decision overridden with Abby-conflict-avoidance motive.

ARC-RF04-002.note: No qualifying child-as-emotional-lever mechanism in B-011. ROW-3727-3728 (Olivia crying about daycare) is cooperative co-parenting communication, not guilt deployment. ROW-3968 comparative framing kept peripheral.

cp3_item.summary: ROW-3892+3935 (Oct 26+31 B-011) — 'dumbass' 4th ADD-002 instance (ROW-3892, Oct 26); second consecutive Halloween Abby-framework attack (ROW-3935, Oct 31): 'You're not trying to get her more candy. You're trying to not fight with Abby. Olivia is more important'; Halloween annual Abby-attack pattern established (B-002 Year 1 → B-011 Year 2); ARC-RF04-001 signals 28-29.
